label: p10_task39_gguf_chunked_prefill_32k_1_revalidation

notes: This revalidates that 32K prefill fits after the GGUF chunked-prefill review fixes on the local RX 7900 XTX/gfx1100 card.
Decode throughput is not meaningful for a one-token decode sample; use the prior 32K/128 smoke or repeated runs for decode comparison.
